_note: O-1 to O-9 onboarding progression for the Charity Onboarding Room (AILANE-SPEC-CSO-003 §6 phase table). The CSO-003 source document is not held in this repository; step text is authored to the AILANE-CC-BRIEF-CSO-ROOM-WEB-001 parameters and is to be verified by the Director at provisioning.

steps.title: Room opened
steps.exit: The onboarding room is live and the entry Terms and Privacy Notice are presented to the charity.

steps.title: Terms and Privacy accepted
steps.exit: The entry acceptance is recorded and the room's surfaces unlock for the charity team.

steps.title: Mutual NDA accepted
steps.exit: AILANE-NDA-RWF-001 is accepted in-room, so both sides can share working material in confidence.

steps.title: Safeguarding statement reviewed
steps.exit: The safeguarding statement has been read and any questions raised and resolved.

steps.title: Founding Charity Partner Agreement accepted
steps.exit: AILANE-AGT-RWF-001 — the fee-waived Founding Charity Partner agreement — is accepted in-room.

steps.title: Obligations register confirmed
steps.exit: The twelve-row obligations register is reviewed and first-due dates are confirmed against the charity's own records.

steps.title: Workspace provisioned
steps.exit: Live access is switched on: documents attach, acceptances record, and Eileen joins the room.

steps.title: First obligations cycle live
steps.exit: Countdown tracking is active and the first filings are prepared ahead of their due dates.

steps.title: Steady state and review
steps.exit: A regular review cadence is agreed and the renewal and expansion path is recorded.
